creator: exploringlondon
caption:
A huge new 10,600 sq ft @marksandspencerfood hall has opened on Tottenham Court Road and they have so much on offer including a new Bakery and Coffee counter serving barista-made drinks and all the latest M&S Food product launches!

Share this with someone who needs to visit!

transcription.text: There's a brand new 10,600 square foot M&S food hall now open on Tottenham Court Road. So let's go and take a look inside. As soon as you walk in you'll see all of the summer picks and fruit and veg, an extensive bread area, as well as a bakery and coffee counter, serving a range of barista made drinks, a fresh sushi counter, all the fab dips and cheeses and condiments and it's primarily self-checkout. Share this with someone who would love to go and check it out.
